if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchCondition != null and searchCondition != ''

choose.otherwise: AND (MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR COMPANY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT m.MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.REGION, m.MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.MANAGER_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE, mg.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_MARKETING, m.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DATE FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER_MANAGER mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO AND mgr.MAIN_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mg ON m.MEMBER_GRADE = mg.DETAIL_CODE AND mg.GROUP_CODE = '005' AND mg.CODE = '005001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.STATUS = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001'
ORDER BY m.JOIN_DATE DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT m.MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.REGION, m.MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.MANAGER_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE, mg.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_MARKETING, m.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DATE FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER_MANAGER mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO AND mgr.MAIN_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mg ON m.MEMBER_GRADE = mg.DETAIL_CODE AND mg.GROUP_CODE = '005' AND mg.CODE = '005001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.STATUS = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001' WHERE m.MEMBER_NO = #{value}

SELECT m.MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.REGION, m.MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.MANAGER_NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NUMBER AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, m.CREDIT_LIMIT, m.MEAT_MONEY, m.MEMBER_GRADE, mg.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_MARKETING, m.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DATE FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER_MANAGER mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO AND mgr.MAIN_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mg ON m.MEMBER_GRADE = mg.DETAIL_CODE AND mg.GROUP_CODE = '005' AND mg.CODE = '005001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.STATUS = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001' WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER ( MEMBER_TYPE, REGION, MEMBER_ID, LOGIN_PW, COMPANY_NAME, BUSINESS_NUMBER, CEO_NAME, CONTACT_NUMBER, EMAIL, COMPANY_PHONE, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, CREDIT_LIMIT, MEAT_MONEY, MEMBER_GRADE, STATUS, AGREE_MARKETING, AGREE_SMS, JOIN_DATE ) VALUES ( #{memberType}, #{region}, #{memberId}, #{loginPw}, #{companyName}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{contactNumber}, #{email}, #{companyPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{creditLimit, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{meatMoney, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{memberGrade}, #{status}, #{agreeMarketing}, #{agreeSms}, #{joinDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_NO as memberNo, m.MEMBER_ID as memberId, m.COMPANY_NAME as companyName, m.CEO_NAME as ceoName FROM TB_MEMBER m WHERE m.MEMBER_TYPE = '003001002' ORDER BY m.COMPANY_NAME
